positive: A stylized illustration of a cosmic sloth among nebulas and crescent moons, rendered in thick, clean vector line art with limited color palette. The sloth is depicted in a relaxed, slightly whimsical pose, surrounded by swirling galaxies and stylized stars. The composition must be centralized and symmetrical, suitable for a t-shirt print. Emphasize deep indigo blues, celestial purples, vibrant teal accents, and warm gold foil highlights. Strong contrast between the silhouette of the sloth and the luminous cosmic background. Graphic design aesthetic, high detail, perfect for screen printing.
